sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51033" key="i)sozugh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσοζῠγ-ής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n51033.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">evenly balanced: equal,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.16.3</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theaet.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
